description_long: This is an adult male figure with a muscular build, wearing a sleeveless tank top and a pair of straight-cut jeans. The figure's arms are relaxed at his sides, and he is dressed in casual attire suitable for an urban environment. His footwear consists of athletic sneakers, and he wears a belt around his jeans. The figure has a short, closely-cropped hairstyle and a clean-shaven face. The overall appearance suggests a confident, physically fit individual commonly seen in city streets or parks.
description: A muscular adult male in a sleeveless tank top, jeans, and sneakers, standing in a relaxed pose. He has a short hairstyle and casual urban attire.
description_view_0: Front view shows the muscular build, sleeveless tank top, belt, and relaxed arm position.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the arm definition, profile of the face, and the fit of the jeans.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back muscles, the back of the tank top, and the jeans' pockets.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing arm definition and the side profile of the head and body.
attribute_clothing_type: casual sleeveless tank top and straight-cut jeans with a belt
